appraisal_events.evidence: car tout le monde savait que dès le lendemain du jour où le prince des Laumes avait épousé sa ravissante cousine, il n'avait pas cessé de la tromper.
appraisal_events.explanation: The passage reports general social knowledge that the duc (then known as the prince des Laumes) has continually been unfaithful, locally diminishing his standing.

status_effects.explanation: His reputation is locally lowered by the acknowledged, ongoing infidelity.
